lastArsListingGapFill.summary: Re-added previously omitted ARS-priced long-term rentals for past-24h buildings, converting rent+expensas at ARS 1,500 per USD.

notes.lastBlacklistRemoval: Removed Alma Palermo (alma-palermo), and blacklisted it on 2026-07-21 by explicit user request.

excludedBuildings.osten-tower: No live exact-building Airbnb or long-term rental with extractable monthly pricing and unit size.
excludedBuildings.osten-tower-ii: Under construction / sale-only inventory; no qualifying rental or Airbnb.
excludedBuildings.udaondo: Project inventory only; no qualifying rental or exact-building Airbnb.
excludedBuildings.aura-nunez: Under construction with 2029 delivery; no qualifying rental or exact-building Airbnb.
excludedBuildings.sky-upgrade: Search-index rental candidates resolved to finalized or stale pages; no live direct listing survived BrightData verification.
excludedBuildings.dome-torre-arcos: Under construction with 2029 delivery; no qualifying rental or exact-building Airbnb.

lastRequestedInventoryAdd.pricingNote: ARS prices converted at ARS 1,500/USD. Only direct listings with extractable monthly price and unit size were added in this pass; Human Abasto's Airbnb was priced and added in the subsequent recent-building audit.

lastRecentBuildingRentalAudit.airbnbPricing: USD 496, 1,484, and 444 per seven nights respectively, extrapolated as weekly price × 30/7.
lastRecentBuildingRentalAudit.longTermResult: No unique live long-term gap remained: new results were already represented units, duplicate syndications, stale listings, 404/410 pages, or an explicitly delisted Roomix record.
lastRecentBuildingRentalAudit.twoBedroomAreaResult: Rechecked all nine against exact-building sold/current sales evidence. Existing estimates remain: 75, 115, 73, 90, 120, 126, 172, 90 extrapolated, and 82 m² respectively.

lastManualBlacklistRemoval.reason: Building removed and blacklisted by explicit user request.

lastAgeBlacklistRemoval.reason: Buildings constructed wholly or partly in the 1980s or 1990s are excluded from this inventory.

notes.lastRecentCompletionGapFill: Added OM Recoleta (2025), Alpha Núñez (2025), Life Barrancas (2025), My Residence (2024) and Alma Palermo (2024) on 2026-07-21 after BrightData verification of completion years and live priced rental/temporary-rental pages. Skipped Velvet Casa Campos (2023 inauguration confirmed, but no live priced rental/Airbnb page survived verification — only sales and a delisted Roomix rental). Skipped Vista Belgrano Tower (Airbnb/rental exist, but construction evidence points to ~2020 rather than 2023–2026). Skipped Lezica OWN Residences (finalized 2025, sale-only / no live rental). Skipped Filum Recoleta (en pozo / delivery ~2027).
notes.lastFiveBuildingAreaAirbnbRentalAudit: Audited OM Recoleta, Alpha Núñez, Life Barrancas, My Residence and Alma Palermo on 2026-07-21: refreshed approx 2BR m² from past-sale evidence (OM 107 via ML; My Residence 96 via RE/MAX; Alma 42 via Argenprop; Life Barrancas 146 covered kept; Alpha ~75 medium kept — no clean 3-amb sale m²). Added missed Airbnb for My Residence (1) and Alma Palermo (2). Added missed/extra long-term rental overlays for OM (ZP USD 1,250 2-amb + Roomix USD 3,750 4-amb), Alpha (Martin Prop ARS 850k studio syndication), and My Residence (Argenprop USD 700 studio syndication). No Airbnb found for OM / Alpha / Life Barrancas.

lastTownHouseSohoRename.summary: Renamed Town House Soho II → Town House Soho (covering II + III). Added user Airbnbs plus verified tower Airbnbs; replaced stale Roomix long-term with live Argenprop 2-amb and Zonaprop studio.
